disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden high fever (39.6) and severe generalised muscle aches beginning about 24 hours ago
trigger_question_examples: When did this start and how quickly?
Does she have a fever or body aches?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It came on suddenly yesterday — a really high fever, like 39.6, and horrible aching all over her body.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Diffuse flat red rash resembling a sunburn covering trunk and limbs, of rapid onset
trigger_question_examples: Where is the rash and what does it look like?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Her whole body is bright red and flat, like a really bad sunburn — it's on her tummy, back, arms and legs.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Lightheadedness with near-blackout on sitting or standing, and new confusion/drowsiness over the last few hours
trigger_question_examples: Is she feeling faint, dizzy or confused?
Can she sit or stand without nearly passing out?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: She blacks out every time she tries to sit up, and in the last few hours she's gone confused and really drowsy.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Currently menstruating and using high-absorbency tampons
trigger_question_examples: Is she having her period right now?
Is she using tampons, a menstrual cup or anything internal at the moment?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yeah, she's on her period and she's been using the super-absorbent tampons.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: Is that even relevant? She's just really sick — I don't see what her period has to do with it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Redness of the eyes and of the inside of the mouth
trigger_question_examples: Do her eyes or mouth look red?
Any redness of the eyes, lips or tongue?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you mention it, her eyes are really bloodshot and the inside of her mouth is bright red.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Profuse watery diarrhoea and repeated vomiting
trigger_question_examples: Has she had any vomiting or diarrhoea?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yeah, she's been throwing up over and over and has really bad watery diarrhoea.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No recent antibiotic use and previously fit and well
trigger_question_examples: Has she taken any antibiotics or new medicines recently?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No antibiotics or anything new — she's normally really healthy.
